data.content: Shipment review approved. All 504 tests pass on main, 95.48% coverage, make sanity clean. The prior regression (invariant index test failure at merge 19ed01a) was resolved by commit 02f9490. Gate knot type with owner_kind and failure_modes persistence is live on main. No invariants defined for this knot. Commits tagged: 19ed01a10975 (merge), 02f94904d306 (regression fix).
